zh.lifeSummary: 當John Starr於1582年12月20日出生在英國英格蘭戴文可利頓時，他的父親Robert Featter Stare29歲，母親Agnes Cate25歲。他於1602年4月12日與Jane Rixforde在英國英格蘭戴文普萊姆斯普萊姆斯 聖 安德魯結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1648年2月20日享年65歲。

nameMeanings.name: Starr
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English sterre ‘star’ (Old English steorra), used, like the Old Norse Stjarna, as a nickname, but also occasionally as a personal name. The word was also used in a transferred sense of a patch of white hair on the forehead of a horse, and so perhaps the nickname denoted someone with a streak of white hair. This surname has been established in Ireland since the 17th century.

English: in addition, the name may occasionally also have been topographic or habitational, referring to a house or inn distinguished by the sign of a star (see 2 above). Surnames derived from house and inn signs are rare in English.

variants.name: Starrs
meanings: English and Scottish (Lanarkshire): variant of Starr , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Star
meanings: German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): nickname from German Star, Middle High German star ‘starling’, probably denoting a talkative or perhaps a voracious person.
Dutch (Van der Star): topographic or habitational name referring to a house distinguished by the sign of a star.
Americanized form (translation into English) of German and Jewish (Ashkenazic)   Stern  .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When John Starr was born on 20 December 1582, in Colyton, Devon, England, United Kingdom, his father, Robert Featter Stare, was 29 and his mother, Agnes Cate, was 25. He married Jane Rixforde on 12 April 1602, in Plymouth St Andrew, Plymouth, Devon, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 20 February 1648, at the age of 65.

ko.lifeSummary: John Starr(이)가 1582년 12월 20일 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 코리턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Featter Stare(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Cate(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1602년 4월 12일 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 플림우스 플림우스 스트 앤드루에서 Jane Rixforde(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1648년 2월 20일 65세의 나이로 사망했다.
